description.value:
Prerequisite: Wis 15, Cha 13. To sign a blood pact, you must find the appropriate Contract. See Chapter 9 for details on obtaining contracts and the various summon tribes.

Benefit: You can summon creatures of the Imperial Wyrm tribe, and gain a +4 bonus to Charisma-based skill checks used on such creatures. While within 50 feet of a summoned Imperial Wyrm, you gain +2 bonus to Diplomacy and Sense Motive checks (sacred).
description.summary: Summon Imperial Wyrm tribe; +4 Cha skill checks vs. Imperial Wyrms; +2 bonus to Diplomacy and Sense Motive checks (sacred) within 50 ft of summon.
